Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major city in Nigeria, known for its economic growth and cultural diversity. It is a hub for business and education, attracting people from all over the country. The city is also home to several important institutions, including universities and research centers. Lekki is a place where people from different backgrounds come together to build a better future.
